name: pi-dependency-safety
description_en: Pi skill for reviewing npm-registry dependency safety across npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun before project initialization, feature work, package additions, or package updates.
description_zh: Pi 技能：在项目初始化、功能开发、包添加或包更新前，通过 npm、pnpm、yarn 和 bun 审查 npm-registry 依赖安全性
